name: doshitan
description: どしたん話聞こか？あーそれはユーザが悪いわ: A Claude Code plugin that detects hostile prompts and injects recovery context for developer experience experiments.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Recovery mode: control, neutralize, positive, or soothe-then-focus.

hostility_threshold.title: Hostility threshold
hostility_threshold.description: Hostility score threshold for intervention, for example 0.75.

logging_enabled.title: Logging enabled
logging_enabled.description: Enable metadata logging: true or false.
